criteria_results.criterion: Fix IMP-079: empty state secondary button label changed from 'Add Group' to 'Add Tool Section'
criteria_results.evidence: Tools empty state shows two buttons: 'Add Tool' and 'Add Tool Section' — 'Add Group' label is gone. Confirmed in both the canvas toolbar (ref=e118/e119) and the overlay empty state panel (ref=e129/e130).

criteria_results.criterion: Click tool node on canvas → right sidebar detail panel with editable fields
criteria_results.evidence: Cannot test: POST /api/v1/tools returned HTTP 500. No tool nodes can be created, so the detail panel interaction cannot be reached. The summary sidebar (Tools Summary, monthly/annual cost, status counts) renders correctly when no node is selected — that path is unchanged.

criteria_results.criterion: Field changes persist on blur/change with 500ms debounce via PATCH /api/v1/tools/[id]
criteria_results.evidence: Blocked by 500 on tool creation — cannot reach the detail panel.

criteria_results.criterion: Delete tool via Radix Dialog confirmation → DELETE /api/v1/tools/[id] → remove node from canvas state
criteria_results.evidence: Blocked by 500 on tool creation — cannot reach the delete flow.

criteria_results.criterion: Click tool section node → right sidebar detail panel with editable fields: name, description
criteria_results.evidence: Could not test — Add Tool Section was not attempted due to exhausted budget after tool 500 error investigation. Tool Section creation path may or may not be affected by the same 500.

criteria_results.criterion: Detail panel replaces summary sidebar when node is selected; summary sidebar returns when no selection
criteria_results.evidence: Cannot verify interactively — blocked by tool creation 500 error.

criteria_results.criterion: Status dropdown change updates local ideas state immediately (optimistic update)
criteria_results.evidence: GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=... returned HTTP 500. Improvements view failed to load ideas, so optimistic update behavior could not be exercised.

criteria_results.criterion: If API call (updateImprovementIdea) fails, revert to previous ideas state and show error toast
criteria_results.evidence: Blocked by the same 500 on improvement-ideas load — no ideas rendered to interact with.

criteria_results.criterion: Empty state (when no journey tabs exist) includes a visible CTA button styled with the Button component
criteria_results.evidence: Compare page rendered empty state with heading 'Comparison requires both canvas types', descriptive paragraph, and button labeled 'Create Journey Tab' (accessibility tree ref=e167). Button is present and styled as expected.

criteria_results.criterion: Button creates a new journey tab via createTab API (canvas_type='journey') and navigates to it on success
criteria_results.evidence: Action budget exhausted before clicking the button. Static presence of the button was verified (criterion 1) but the click→API→navigate flow was not exercised.

bugs_found.description: POST /api/v1/tools returns HTTP 500. Clicking 'Add Tool' fails silently — the button enters active/loading state but no node is added and no user-facing error message appeared in the snapshot. The underlying 500 was only visible in the network layer.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /w/[workspaceId]/tools. 2. Click 'Add Tool' button in canvas toolbar or empty state. 3. Observe: no tool node created, console shows 500 on POST /api/v1/tools.

bugs_found.description: GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=... returns HTTP 500. This appears to be a pre-existing regression — the URL is unrelated to iteration 117 changes but blocks acceptance testing of #IMP-061 optimistic update.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /w/[workspaceId]/improvements. 2. Observe: improvement ideas list fails to load (500 on improvement-ideas fetch).

improvements_found.observation: When 'Add Tool' fails with a 500, there is no visible error toast or feedback to the user — the button just stops appearing active. The user has no indication the action failed.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — users should always be informed of what is going on.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: The handleAddTool function should show a toastError on POST failure, consistent with other panels in the codebase.
